evals.name: design-crud-resource
evals.prompt: Design CRUD endpoints for a 'book review' resource with pagination. Include create, read, update, delete, and list operations.
expected: GET for reads, POST for create, PATCH for update, DELETE for remove
201 Created with Location header for POST
Error response with code and message

evals.name: design-pagination-large-dataset
evals.prompt: Design pagination for an endpoint returning 100k+ records that needs consistent performance during concurrent inserts.

evals.name: design-error-response
evals.prompt: Design error response format for validation failures including field-level details.
expected: Includes field name and error code per detail

evals.name: design-filtering-sorting
evals.prompt: Design filtering and sorting for a products list endpoint: filter by category (multiple values), price range, and sort by price descending or name ascending.
expected: Query params for filtering (category, price[gte], price[lte])
Sort param with prefix for descending (-)

evals.name: design-rate-limiting
evals.prompt: Design rate limiting strategy for a public API with anonymous (30/min), authenticated (100/min), and premium (1000/min) tiers.

evals.name: design-versioning
evals.prompt: Design versioning strategy for a breaking change: renaming 'username' field to 'display_name' in user response.
expected: Non-breaking changes listed (adding fields, optional params)
Breaking changes listed (removing, renaming fields, changing types)
